creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
I thought I updated this bug on 5/12 however it appears I didn't.

Running with the attached patch updated:

 - Update to 14.9.2
 - pkg-plist
 - added test
 - python 3.10 (263133)
 - patch to fix openssl test

Review up at https://reviews.freebsd.org/D35192

Based off 263133, 263590, 263133  can we get a wellness check on the maintainer?
